creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 166754
firefox, firefox-i18n, linux-firefox, nss

Attached patch updates www/firefox et al to 44.0.1 and devel/nss to 3.22
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Mozilla/Projects/NSS/NSS_3.22_release_notes
https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/44.0.1/releasenotes/ (not there yet)

poudriere ok, "make test" in devel/nss is broken whith IPv6 connectivity (mozilla 366614 - seems to be a known issue), but I cannot do without IPv6.
